title: collinsia torreyi var. typica
intro: Collinsia torreyi var. typica, also known as the blue throatwort or blue lips, is a plant species belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This perennial herb has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Collinsia torreyi var. typica include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
